title: Parameters with SupplyParameterFromQuery attribute should be preferred only in routable components
description: Parameters with SupplyParameterFromQuery attribute should be used only in routable componentsAnalyze your codeintentionality-logicalreliabilityCode SmellblazorComponent parameters can only receive query parameter values in routable components with an @page directive.Why is this an issue?How can I fix it?More InfoSupplyParameterFromQueryattribute is used to specify that a component parameter of a routable component comes from thequery string.In the case of non-routable components, theSupplyParameterFromQuerydoes not contribute to the functionality, and removing it will not affect the behavior.Available In:Catch issues on the fly,in your IDEDetect issues in your GitHub, Azure DevOps Services, Bitbucket Cloud, GitLab repositoriesAnalyze
recommendation: Remove the problematic code and refactor as needed.

logic.detection_conditions: Detects classes with SupplyParameterFromQuery attributes on parameters that do not have @page directive
logic.triggering_conditions: ClassDeclaration nodes containing SupplyParameterFromQuery attributes but no @page directive in the source
logic.exclusion_conditions: Excludes classes with @page directive, unit tests, logging statements, generated code, abstract classes, and generated partial classes
never_trigger_on: Abstract classes (might be base classes for routable components)
logic.reasoning: Detects Blazor components that use SupplyParameterFromQuery attribute without being routable. The pattern matches any SupplyParameterFromQuery attribute usage. Excludes routable components (with @page), generated code, abstract classes, and other safe contexts where this rule should not apply.

should_trigger: public partial class MyComponent : ComponentBase { [Parameter, SupplyParameterFromQuery] public string SearchTerm { get; set; } }
public class SearchComponent { [SupplyParameterFromQuery] public int PageSize { get; set; } }
should_not_trigger: @page "/search" public partial class MyComponent : ComponentBase { [Parameter, SupplyParameterFromQuery] public string SearchTerm { get; set; } }
public partial class MyComponent : ComponentBase { [Parameter] public string SearchTerm { get; set; } }
[Test] public class MyComponent { [Parameter, SupplyParameterFromQuery] public string SearchTerm { get; set; } }
abstract class BaseComponent { [SupplyParameterFromQuery] public string SearchTerm { get; set; } }
